tasks.subject: Task 1: jsonReporter + unit test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New Reporter implementation emitting NDJSON events; full unit-test coverage. Lands without touching the CLI.

**Files:**
- Modify: reporter.go
- Modify: reporter_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] progressEvent struct with type/label/msg/error fields, omitempty on optionals
- [ ] NewJSONReporter(w io.Writer) Reporter exists
- [ ] TestJSONReporter covers Step/Done(msg), Step/Done(empty), Step/Fail, Info, Warn — exact byte assertion
- [ ] go vet clean; existing tests pass

**Verify:** `go vet ./... && go test -race -count=1 -run TestJSONReporter -v ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["reporter.go", "reporter_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go vet ./... && go test -race -count=1 -run TestJSONReporter -v ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["progressEvent struct exists", "NewJSONReporter exists", "TestJSONReporter passes", "go vet clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wire --progress=json through parseSubcommand + per-subcommand dispatch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** CLI accepts --progress=json on pack/unpack/verify; uses NewJSONReporter when set; rejects --progress=json --quiet combo before run.

**Files:**
- Modify: main.go (commonFlags, parseSubcommand, runPack/runUnpack/runVerify dispatch)
- Modify: help.go (three help texts)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] commonFlags.progress field added
- [ ] parseSubcommand validates --progress value (only "" or "json")
- [ ] --progress=json + --quiet rejected with usage error
- [ ] All three runFoo handlers select reporter via switch
- [ ] Help texts updated
- [ ] go vet clean; tests pass

**Verify:** `go vet ./... && go test -race -count=1 ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["main.go", "help.go"], "verifyCommand": "go vet ./... && go test -race -count=1 ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["commonFlags has progress field", "invalid value rejected", "json+quiet rejected", "three reporter dispatches updated", "help texts mention --progress=json"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: End-to-end CLI tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Regression tests for pack --progress=json (event sequence) and the --progress=json --quiet rejection.

**Files:**
- Modify: cli_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] TestCLIPackProgressJSON runs pack against synthetic fixture, parses NDJSON, asserts step/done pairing + required step labels
- [ ] TestCLIProgressJSONQuietConflict asserts exitUsage + 'mutually exclusive' in stderr
- [ ] go vet clean; full suite passes

**Verify:** `go test -race -count=1 -run 'TestCLIPackProgressJSON|TestCLIProgressJSONQuietConflict' -v ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cli_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -race -count=1 -run 'TestCLIPackProgressJSON|TestCLIProgressJSONQuietConflict' -v ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["happy-path event sequence assertion", "mutual-exclusivity rejection assertion", "all tests pass"]}
```
